name: Mississippi Mud
recipeInstructions:
1. THOROUGHLY BLEND CRUST INGREDIENTS IN CUISINART.
2. PRESS MIXTURE FIRMLY IN BOTTOM OF PAN.
3. COMBINE HALF OF THE COOL WHIP, SUGAR, AND CREAM CHEESE TOGETHER.
4. SPREAD MIXTURE ON TOP OF CRUST.
5. WHIP THE REMAINING COOL WHIP, MILK, AND CREAM CHEESE TOGETHER.
6. SPREAD ON TOP OF CREME CHEESE MIXTURE.
7. ADD REMAINING COOL WHIP ON TOP.
